response.justification: Bogdan brings a strong software engineering foundation spanning 15+ years with TypeScript/Node.js expertise, high-volume data pipeline experience at Sociomantic, and directly relevant MCP (Model Context Protocol) work at his current role. However, the job's core GenAI requirements reveal significant gaps: Python is absent from his skillset entirely, there is no mention of vector databases or RAG architectures, and his AI/agentic experience only appears from April 2025 onward in vague terms. The role demands 8+ years of AI-driven solution development, which his track record does not support. A screening call to probe the depth of his current GenAI work is warranted before ruling him out.
strengths: Direct hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow infrastructure work at current Staff-level role
Proven high-throughput data integration experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with real-time metadata pipelines
Consistent Staff/senior-level technical leadership across multiple organisations with evidence of mentoring and knowledge-sharing
concerns: Python is entirely absent from listed skills and employment history, despite being a primary required language for the role
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or any named GenAI framework (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
GenAI/AI-agent experience is limited to the current role started April 2025, falling well short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions

key_factors.factor: MCP server and agentic workflow contributions
